challenges.title: Simple Skew on Hover
challenges.description: Create a box that skews 10deg on X-axis when hovered.

challenges.title: Skew Direction Toggle
challenges.description: Create an element that alternates skew direction on each click using classes.
challenges.hint: Toggle classes with different skewX values.

challenges.title: Ribbon Banner with Counter-Skew
challenges.description: Create a ribbon banner with skewed background and straight text.
challenges.hint: Skew parent, counter-skew child with opposite value.

solution.css: .ribbon { transform: skewX(-20deg); background: red; padding: 5px 20px; } .ribbon span { display: inline-block; transform: skewX(20deg); }

challenges.title: Parallax Panel Effect
challenges.description: Create panels with different skew and scale values to simulate 3D depth.
challenges.hint: Combine skewY with scaleY for perspective effect.

solution.css: .panel1 { transform: skewY(5deg) scaleY(0.9); } .panel2 { transform: skewY(-3deg) scaleY(0.95); } .panel3 { transform: skewY(2deg); }

challenges.title: 3D Cuboid with Skew
challenges.description: Create a 3D cuboid/box using skew on all faces.
challenges.hint: Use skewX and skewY to create each face of a 3D box, positioned with absolute.
challenges.expected_outcome: A 3D-looking box rendered with 2D skew transforms.

solution.css: .face-front { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); } .face-top { transform: skewX(-30deg) skewY(10deg); } .face-side { transform: skewX(30deg) skewY(-10deg); }
